privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real San Francisco UrbanSim dataset (sanfran_public.h5) from the UDST GitHub repository. I ran the ground truth python script locally against the dataset and confirmed that exactly 190 valid zones are analyzed. For zones with >= 10 buildings, the 5 most diverse zones are [188, 3, 11, 21, 76] and the 5 least diverse zones are [187, 92, 136, 152, 184]. The mean normalized entropy is approximately 0.455. The verifier strictly checks the agent's output CSV and JSON against these hidden values generated in /var/lib/urbansim_ground_truth/entropy_ground_truth.json.
